notes: Generated with built-in image generation as a stronger neon redo of the Festival Colossus Walker horror war-machine line.
The source sheet contains four roughly equal-footprint pure robot walker evolution forms, one static prism munition, and one disabled Mk4 wreck defeat state.
Evolution is expressed through added shield emitters, tusk railguns, dorsal cannons, side racks, command hardware, reactor nodes, and heavier hydraulics rather than major size changes.
Runtime frames were extracted from isolated alpha masks because the source particle and wreck bounding boxes overlap horizontally, then repacked with safe transparent insets to prevent clipping.
